title: tilia × europaea var. pallida
intro: Tilia × europaea var. pallida, also known as Silver Lime or Pale Lime, is a variety of lime tree that is native to Europe and is characterized by its pale yellow flowers and silver-gray leaves. The medicinal properties of Tilia × europaea var. pallida include its anti-inflammatory, sedative, and antispasmodic effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of this plant include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation and sleep, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and calm respiratory problems. Tilia × europaea var. pallida is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties and health benefits.
